description:
Generate a semantic main navigation bar with three top-level items, each with a dropdown menu.
Use <nav aria-label="Main navigation"> and nested ul-in-li structure, with aria-haspopup/aria-expanded on trigger buttons and role="menuitem" for dropdown links. Include tabindex="-1" for non-focused items and include keyboard arrow-key handling markers in the output (ArrowRight, ArrowLeft, ArrowDown, ArrowUp).
